title: XTS-A
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''XTS-A''''' was a group of two [[MB-C1 medium transport|Mobquet medium transports]] operated by the [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
